# AppLock.App

**Device Management Profile**

The only app available for use on the iOS device.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppLock.App
```

## Objects

- **AppLock.App.Options**: The dictionary of options to set for the app.
- **AppLock.App.UserEnabledOptions**: The dictionary of user-editable options to set for the app.
